testcase.name: test_fit_request_creates_notification

failure.message: AssertionError: Fit request not successful: {'message': 'Fitness request submitted successfully', 'request_id': 'FIT-20260129-2EA7DA', 'ticket_id': 'TKT-B4153D45', 'notification_id': 'NOTIF-D8BFB141', 'inbox_id': 'INBOX-34BF5243'} assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb66b4786040>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb66b4786040> = {'inbox_id': 'INBOX-34BF5243', 'message': 'Fitness request submitted successfully', 'notification_id': 'NOTIF-D8BFB141', 'request_id': 'FIT-20260129-2EA7DA', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:180: in test_fit_request_creates_notification assert data.get("success") == True, f"Fit request not successful: {data}" E AssertionError: Fit request not successful: {'message': 'Fitness request submitted successfully', 'request_id': 'FIT-20260129-2EA7DA', 'ticket_id': 'TKT-B4153D45', 'notification_id': 'NOTIF-D8BFB141', 'inbox_id': 'INBOX-34BF5243'} E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb66b4786040>('success') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb66b4786040> = {'inbox_id': 'INBOX-34BF5243', 'message': 'Fitness request submitted successfully', 'notification_id': 'NOTIF-D8BFB141', 'request_id': 'FIT-20260129-2EA7DA', ...}.get
